languages.text: Eo-gann can use {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} on himself, lowering his Resolve by 100% for 1 round. He doesn't gain AP this way, but can make an additional attack instead. Also, Eo-gann receives +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} bonus to WS, BS, AGI, and PER while under the effect of this ability.

traits.locale_text: Eo-gann can use {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} on himself, lowering his Resolve by 100% for 1 round. Also, Eo-gann receives +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} bonus to WS, BS, AGI, and PER while under the effect of this ability.

languages.text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

He doesn't gain AP this way, but can make an additional attack instead. Also, Eo-gann receives +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} bonus to WS, BS, AGI, and PER while under the effect of this ability.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his resolve is reduced by −100% for 1 round.
He does not gain AP but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} Weapon Skill, Ballistic Skill, Agility, and Perception.

Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his resolve is reduced by −100% for 1 round.
He does not gain AP but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} Weapon Skill, Ballistic Skill, Agility, and Perception.

languages.text:
Эоганн может выбрать себя целью способности {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Особое поручение{/g}. В этом случае его {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} снижается на −100% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.
Он не получает {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g}, но вместо этого может совершить дополнительную атаку. Под действием этой способности Эоганн получает +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнему Бою{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятию{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Эоганн может выбрать себя целью способности {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Особое поручение{/g}. В этом случае его {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} снижается на −100% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.
Он не получает {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g}, но вместо этого может совершить дополнительную атаку. Под действием этой способности Эоганн получает +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнему Бою{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятию{/g}.

Эоганн может выбрать себя целью способности {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Особое поручение{/g}. В этом случае его {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}решимость{/g} снижается на −100% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.
Он не получает {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g}, но вместо этого может совершить дополнительную атаку. Под действием этой способности Эоганн получает +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнему Бою{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Дальнему Бою{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятию{/g}.

languages.text:
Eogunn puede afectarse a sí mismo con la capacidad {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}¡Derribadlo!{/g}. En ese caso, su {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} se reduce un −100 % durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
No obtiene {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}, pero a cambio puede lanzar un ataque adicional. Mientras esté bajo los efectos de esta capacidad, Eogunn gana +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Habilidad de proyectiles{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn puede afectarse a sí mismo con la capacidad {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}¡Derribadlo!{/g}. En ese caso, su {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}firmeza{/g} se reduce un −100 % durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
No obtiene {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}, pero a cambio puede lanzar un ataque adicional. Mientras esté bajo los efectos de esta capacidad, Eogunn gana +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Habilidad de proyectiles{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g}.

languages.text:
Eogunn kann sich selbst die Fähigkeit {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring es zu Ende!{/g} gewähren. In diesem Fall wird seine {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um −100 % reduziert.
Er erhält keine {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}, aber einen zusätzlichen Angriff. Solange er diese Fähigkeit hat, erhält Eogunn +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistikfähigkeit{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

Eogunn kann sich selbst die Fähigkeit {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring es zu Ende!{/g} gewähren. In diesem Fall wird seine {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Entschlossenheit{/g} 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um −100 % reduziert.
Er erhält keine {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}, aber einen zusätzlichen Angriff. Solange er diese Fähigkeit hat, erhält Eogunn +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistikfähigkeit{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g}.

languages.text:
Eogunn peut utiliser la capacité {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Descendez-le !{/g} sur lui-même, auquel cas sa {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} est réduite de -100 % pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
Il ne gagne pas de {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}, mais peut effectuer une attaque supplémentaire à la place. Sous l'effet de cette capacité, Eogunn gagne +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Capacité de tir{/g}, à l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} et à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

Eogunn peut utiliser la capacité {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Descendez-le !{/g} sur lui-même, auquel cas sa {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}Détermination{/g} est réduite de -100 % pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
Il ne gagne pas de {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}, mais peut effectuer une attaque supplémentaire à la place. Sous l'effet de cette capacité, Eogunn gagne +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g}, à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Capacité de tir{/g}, à l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} et à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

languages.text:
Eogunn, {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Yere Ser!{/g} kabiliyeti ile kendisini hedefleyebilir. Bu durumda {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} değeri, %100 azalır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} kazanmaz ama onun yerine ilave bir saldırı gerçekleştirebilir. Eogunn; bu kabiliyetin etkisindeyken +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} kazanır.

Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

Eogunn, {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Yere Ser!{/g} kabiliyeti ile kendisini hedefleyebilir. Bu durumda {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}kararlılık{/g} değeri, %100 azalır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} kazanmaz ama onun yerine ilave bir saldırı gerçekleştirebilir. Eogunn; bu kabiliyetin etkisindeyken +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Balistik Yetenek{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} kazanır.

languages.text:
伊奥贡可对自己使用{g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}把它干掉！{/g}能力。这种情况下，他的{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}降低100%，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
他不会获得{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}，但可以进行一次额外攻击。在此能力效果影响下，伊奥贡的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}提高{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa}点。
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
伊奥贡可对自己使用{g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}把它干掉！{/g}能力。这种情况下，他的{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}决心{/g}降低100%，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
他不会获得{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}，但可以进行一次额外攻击。在此能力效果影响下，伊奥贡的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}弹道技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}提高{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa}点。

languages.text:
エオガンは{g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}撃ち倒せ！{/g}アビリティで自分自身を対象にできる。この場合、彼の{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}士気{/g}が1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間−100%減少する。
彼は{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を得ないが、代わりに追加攻撃を1回行える。このアビリティの効果中、エオガンは{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}近接技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}射撃技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g}が+{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa}増加する。
languages.original_text:
Eogunn can target himself with the {g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}Bring It Down!{/g} ability. In this case, his {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is reduced by −100% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
He does not gain {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} but can make an additional attack instead. While under the effect of this ability, Eogunn gains +{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}.

エオガンは{g|f:5bfccf14d8604ae1a041fb347fb8f19f}撃ち倒せ！{/g}アビリティで自分自身を対象にできる。この場合、彼の{g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}士気{/g}が1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間−100%減少する。
彼は{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を得ないが、代わりに追加攻撃を1回行える。このアビリティの効果中、エオガンは{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}近接技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}射撃技能{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g}が+{uip|StatBonus|fb3769f45c4b4429aeb5c6323be7b8fa}増加する。
